series_metadata.series_description: A detailed description of job duties, knowledge, skills andabilities for each position. May contain original signed position description;, PSMQ(position specific minimum qualifications), requests to DAS for PSMQ and DAS approval.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in office untilsuperseded, obsolete orreplaced ; Electronic: in office untilsuperseded, obsolete orreplaced
